input: translate question to sparql: Who are the authors of the paper 'Efficient Pneumonia Detection in Chest Xray Images Using Deep Transfer Learning'?
output: SELECT ?author WHERE { ?p title 'Efficient Pneumonia Detection in Chest Xray Images Using Deep Transfer Learning' . ?p authored_by ?a . ?a name ?author }

input: translate question to sparql: What is the most cited paper published in Journal of machine learning research?
output: SELECT ?title WHERE { ?p published_in ?v . ?v name 'Journal of machine learning research' . ?p title ?title } ORDER BY DESC(?citations) LIMIT 1

input: translate question to sparql: Which papers cite 'Knowledge Graphs Enhanced Neural Machine Translation' and are about Computer Science?
output: SELECT ?p WHERE { ?p cites ?ref . ?ref title 'Knowledge Graphs Enhanced Neural Machine Translation' . ?p has_topic ?t . ?t name 'Computer Science' }

input: translate question to sparql: When was the paper 'MetaMath: Bootstrap Your Own Mathematical Questions for Large Language Models' published?
output: SELECT ?year WHERE { ?p title 'MetaMath: Bootstrap Your Own Mathematical Questions for Large Language Models' . ?p published_year ?year }

input: translate question to sparql: Which paper has more citations: 'Natural-Language Processing' or 'Evaluating Multilingual Question Answering Systems at CLEF'?
output: SELECT ?title WHERE { VALUES ?title {'Natural-Language Processing' 'Evaluating Multilingual Question Answering Systems at CLEF'} ?p title ?title } ORDER BY DESC(?citations) LIMIT 1
